items.description: A llama.cpp fork that adds support for Apple NPU and Metal.

items.description: Open source OCR tool, easy to use

items.name: CEOAgent.net
items.description: CEOAgent.net is not just another AI chat tool. It is the first “AI Enterprise Operating System” in human history — a closed-loop decision-making and execution system that simulates a CEO plus a full C-suite executive team, delivering end-to-end AI collaboration capabilities from strategy to execution for businesses and professionals anywhere…

items.name: VWGCCzSiPA
items.description: 出行旅游安排系统基于协同过滤算法，采用Java、Vue2、SpringBoot3等前后端分离技术构建。系统包含用户模块（注册、登录、信息管理）、景点信息模块（列表展示、详情查看、搜索、收藏）、评论模块（发表评论、点赞、管理）、旅游攻略模块（列表、详情、发布、收藏）、门票预订模块（查询、预订、订单管理）、周边住宿模块（列表、详情、筛选、评价）、后台管理模块及轮播图模块。支持远程调试部署，提供设计文档及数据库文件。

items.name: ABxnmxqvPV
items.description: 基于springboot+uniapp的非遗研学小程序包含前端、后台及后端服务。前端提供登录注册、非遗学习内容（含课程与VR）、研学线路浏览与报名、学习记录及个人中心等功能；后台管理端支持内容、研学及报名的运营管理；后端基于springboot提供统一API、鉴权及数据文件服务，实现多端协同。

items.name: ondevice-ai-civil-complaint
items.description: On-device AI 민원 처리 및 분석 시스템 | LLM 경량화 & 파인튜닝 | 현장미러형 연계 프로젝트 - 산업체 수요 기반 현장 실무 역량 강화

items.name: ReTro_Forum
items.description: Retro Forum is a modern discussion platform built with Tailwind CSS and JavaScript. It features dynamic post fetching, real-time search, and an interactive "Mark as Read" queue. Designed with a sleek, responsive UI, it offers a seamless community experience for browsing and tracking topics. Demo: https://youtu.be/rjWn2UvJGRE?si=ouA0xTLgiBrT41x2

items.name: FHRsaOVcyy
items.description: 本项目是一款基于springboot和vue的新能源汽车管理系统，致力于实现智能化车辆管理。系统核心功能全面覆盖新能源汽车的管理需求，通过前后端分离架构，确保高效操作体验。主要提供车辆数据监控、统计与分析等，助力用户便捷管理新能源汽车，提升管理效率。采用MySQL数据库，保障数据稳定性和可靠性。
